data.body: Fix committed on giverm/OSCER-680-dashboard-500-automated-exemptions (dd0fe84d). TDD: red run reproduced the production NoMethodError + double-encoded payload; green after. Producer now stores an OSCER-idiomatic Hash ({ "exemption_reasons" => reason_codes }) instead of reasons.to_json; consumer resolves exemption type by decision_method (automated → reason code, manual → determination_data behind an is_a?(Hash) guard); added the missing veteran_disability_exempt locale key. RuboCop clean, full suite green. Not yet pushed / no PR — awaiting authorization.
